title: aquilegia vulgaris inversa
intro: Aquilegia vulgaris inversa, also known as the Granny's Bonnet or inverted Columbine, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the buttercup family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Aquilegia vulgaris inversa are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and support respiratory health, among other benefits. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
